title: roasted floral aerated australian vegetables bake
description: a delightful brunch dish featuring roasted vegetables, shio-koji-cure, and a light aerated texture, making it a perfect low-carb friendly option.
instructions: Peel and chop the sweet potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
Cut the carrots and zucchini into 1/2-inch thick slices.
Cut the red bell pepper into 1-inch pieces.
Place the sweet potatoes, carrots, zucchini, and red bell pepper on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Toss with olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
In a separate bowl, crumble the shio-koji cured eggplant into small pieces.
Add the crumbled eggplant to the baking sheet with the roasted vegetables.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley and crumbled feta cheese over the top of the vegetables.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
